text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Ah... Where do I even begin?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I was so determined to make you smile this time
around, but I keep getting these sorts of results...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: If this keeps up, I'll just be dragging you down...
choice_data_list: There's no need to get so worked up.
There's no need to get so worked up.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: If this keeps up, I'll just be dragging you down...
choice_data_list: There's no need to get so worked up.
There's no need to get so worked up.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You're right. If I give up now, then all of your
hard work will go to waste.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: That's one thing I will never do. Mark my words.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer... How are you always so kind?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I bet it's the strength of your spirit that allows you
to be so nice.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... How is it that someone so cute can guide
me with such confidence?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I promise to repay you for your goodwill. I'll get
first place... for you.
